children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: The Corporation shall be under the management of the board of directors.

children.label: A
children.text: 5 members shall be elected by holders of common stock that are insurance companies, banks, or other financial institutions or entities;

children.label: B
children.text: 5 members shall be elected by holders of common stock that are Farm Credit System institutions; and

children.label: i
children.text: which members shall not be, or have been, officers or directors of any financial institutions or entities;

children.label: ii
children.text: which members shall be representatives of the general public;

children.label: iii
children.text: of which members not more than 3 shall be members of the same political party; and

children.label: iv
children.text: of which members at least 2 shall be experienced in farming or ranching.

children.heading: Elected members
children.label: A Elected members
children.text: Subject to paragraph (5), a vacancy among the members elected to the Board in the manner described in subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (2) shall be filled by the Board from among persons eligible for election to the position for which the vacancy exists.

children.heading: Appointed members
children.label: B Appointed members
children.text: A vacancy among the members appointed to the Board under paragraph (2)(C) shall be filled in the manner in which the original appointment was made.

children.label: A
children.text: any member of the Board who was appointed or elected to the Board from among persons who are representatives of banks, other financial institutions or entities, insurance companies, or Farm Credit System institutions ceases to be such a representative; or

children.label: B
children.text: any member who was appointed from persons who are not or have not been directors or officers of any financial institution or entity becomes a director or an officer of any financial institution or entity;

children.heading: Appointed members
children.label: A Appointed members
children.text: The members appointed by the President shall serve at the pleasure of the President.

children.heading: Elected members
children.label: B Elected members
children.text: The members elected under subparagraphs (A) and (B) of subsection (b)(2) shall each be elected annually for a term ending on the date of the next annual meeting of the common stockholders of the Corporation and shall serve until their successors are elected and qualified. Any seat on the Board that becomes vacant after the annual election of the directors shall be filled by the members of the Board from the same category of directors, but only for the unexpired portion of the term.

children.heading: Vacancy appointment
children.label: C Vacancy appointment
children.text: Any member appointed to fill a vacancy occurring before the expiration of the term for which the predecessor of the member was appointed shall be appointed only for the remainder of such term.

children.heading: Service after expiration of term
children.label: D Service after expiration of term
children.text: A member may serve after the expiration of the term of the member until the successor of the member has taken office.

children.heading: Quorum
children.label: 6 Quorum
children.text: 8 members of the Board shall constitute a quorum.

children.heading: No additional pay for Federal officers or employees
children.label: 7 No additional pay for Federal officers or employees
children.text: Members of the Board who are fulltime officers or employees of the United States shall receive no additional pay by reason of service on the Board.

children.heading: Chairperson
children.label: 8 Chairperson
children.text: The President shall designate 1 of the members of the Board who are appointed by the President as the chairperson of the Board.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: 9 Meetings
children.text: The Board shall meet at the call of the chairperson or a majority of its members.

children.heading: Officers and staff
children.label: b Officers and staff
children.text: The Board may appoint, employ, fix the pay of, and provide other allowances and benefits for such officers and employees of the Corporation as the Board determines to be appropriate.
